title: PFW: Aethetic Gems
body:
This mod (for now) add 36 new gems, with their respectives tools and armors, I'll add more and more thing, including new features
 
Add gems, blocks, armor and tools of respective gems:



-Alexandrite   (The End)

-Amazonite   (Overworld)

-Aquamarine   (Overworld)

-Blue Sapphire   (Overworld)

-Blue Tanzanite   (Nether)

-Chrome Dravite Tourmaline   (The End)

-Golden Citrine   (Nether)

-Green Emerald   (Overworld)

-Green Fluorite   (Nether)

-Grossular Diopsite   (Overworld)

-Heliodor   (The End)

-Ice Blue Topaz   (The End)

-Imperial Garnet   (Nether)

-Kunzite   (Nether)

-Kyanite   (Nether)

-Lapis Lazuli   (Overworld)

-Magenta Sapphire   (Overworld)

-Machite   (Nether)

-Onyx   (The End)

-Orange Zircon   (Nether)

-Palmeira Citrine  (Overworld)

-Peridot   (Nether)

-Pink Spinel   (Overworld)

-Pink Topaz   (Nether)

-Prasiolite   (Nether)

-Purple Amethyst   (Overworld)

-Purple Crazy Lace Agate   (The End)

-Red Fluorite   (The End)

-Red Jasper   (Overworld)

-Red Ruby   (Overworld)

-Rhodonite   (The End)

-Rose Quartz   (The End)

-Smoky Quartz   (Overworld)

-Sunstone   (The End)

-Yellow Diamond   (Nether)

-White Diamond   (The End)






Also add a new stick, "Fortified Stick", which can be use to do all tools
